name: Wild Rice Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Cream of chicken soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions.
2. Blend in soup and the next six ingredients; mix gently.
3. Add broth and mix.
4. Spread mixture in a 13x9x2 inch dish.
5. Sprinkle with topping.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
